witness_name.description: The witness's identity, as it appears in cosignature lines. Per c2sp.org/signed-note, this MUST NOT contain the '+', whitespace, or control characters.

submission_prefix.description: URL prefix for write APIs (e.g. https://witness.example/).

monitoring_prefix.description: URL prefix for read APIs. Currently unused by the tlog-witness spec but reserved for future monitor-facing endpoints.

logs.description: Logs this witness will accept checkpoints for, keyed by a short identifier used only internally. The identifier does not appear on the wire.

origin.description: The log's origin line, as it appears in checkpoint notes.

items.description: A DER-encoded SubjectPublicKeyInfo, base64-encoded. The witness accepts checkpoint signatures from any of these keys and ignores signatures from others.
